responsibilities: Design and build self-service developer tooling to remove friction from software delivery
Own reliability and scalability of shared Kubernetes clusters across three AWS regions
Develop and maintain Terraform modules consumed by 200+ product teams
Evaluate and introduce new tooling to improve platform observability and developer experience
Collaborate with security team to enforce compliance and secrets management
Participate in on-call rotation to maintain 99.9% SLA on core platform services

mustHaveSkills.name: Kubernetes
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Strong proficiency in Kubernetes (CKA or equivalent experience strongly preferred)

mustHaveSkills.name: AWS
mustHaveSkills.rawText: AWS (EKS, IAM, VPC, S3, CloudWatch) – must be hands-on

mustHaveSkills.name: Go
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Programming proficiency in Go or Python

mustHaveSkills.name: Python
mustHaveSkills.rawText: Programming proficiency in Go or Python

workAuthorizationSignals: Visa sponsorship may be available for exceptional candidates

redFlags.description: Salary range not disclosed; described only as 'competitive' and discussed during interview

summary: Senior platform engineering role at Atlassian owning Kubernetes infrastructure and developer tooling at scale. Strong IaC and observability skills required. Fully remote within Australia; visa sponsorship possible for exceptional candidates.
